response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and deep technical curiosity, with notable contributions to tooling and open-source projects, but his resume lacks explicit, recent, or deep involvement with Java/Kotlin, Spring, JVM internals, or enterprise IDE tooling — key requirements for this role. His Java exposure appears historical and peripheral, with no evidence of building or maintaining IDE subsystems or enterprise framework tooling.
strengths: Proven track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong experience with cross-stack development and performance-critical systems
Demonstrated passion for teaching and improving developer experience through workshops and talks
concerns: Minimal recent or demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin or JVM tooling in professional context
No evidence of work on IDE internals, language servers, or enterprise framework integration (Spring, Hibernate, etc.)
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang; Java appears as a minor or historical component
